metadata.description: Public marketplace for Claude Code plugins and MCP clients from CE Dot Net

plugins.name: ace
plugins.description: Code Engine ACE - Intelligent pattern learning with continuous auto-search. v6.3.2: CRITICAL FIX - validator now accepts UUID-format pattern IDs (post Qdrant migration). Requires: Claude Code >= 2.1.100, ace-cli >= 3.14.3.
